== Peter Jr. ♂ ==
The beating gave the developer an epiphany. Now he focuses on gameplay, not monetization.

=== Begin Friendship ===
To obtain Peter Jr., free him from the [[Koryeon Domain]] and wait 24 hours after defeating him. He will request 3k W-tads.

=== ☆☆☆ > ★★★ ===
After 5 letters back and forth, Peter Jr. will move in permanently with his minion, Keyboard Warrior.

== Rent ==
[[File:Peter jr rent.png|left|300px]]

Peter Jr. rent is collected on '''Tuesday''' and on the floor at his feet. 

 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Tetrabiblos|blue}} +5

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Nocturnes|blue}} +5; {{RewardIconWithLink|Commercial Code|blue}} +5

 '''1-time Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Snail Quiz - Yamato|black|Minigames}}

{{clear}}

== Relics ==
Upgrading these will earn {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}}!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward
|-
|★
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +1h
|-
|★★
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +1h
|-
|★★★
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +1h
|-
|★★★★
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +2h
|-
|★★★★★
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +3h
|-
|★★★★★★
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +4h
|}

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{RewardIconWithLink|Divergence Meter|black|Divergence Meter|50}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{RewardIconWithLink|Enigma Machine|black|Enigma Machine|50}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{RewardIconWithLink|Turing Machine|black|Turing Machine|50}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{RewardIconWithLink|Mars Rover|black|Mars Rover|50}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{RewardIconWithLink|Deep Navy Computer|black|Deep Navy Computer|50}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{RewardIconWithLink|Morse's Telegraph|black|Morse's Telegraph|50}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{RewardIconWithLink|Pt-Cont Transistor|black|Pt-Cont Transistor|50}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{RewardIconWithLink|Devol's Robot|black|Devol's Robot|50}}
|}

== Bald Dev ==
Pervasive crunch culture in the gaming industry made his head as shiny as a mirror.

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||TECH +5||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +0.3%
|-
|2||180||2k||TECH +10||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +0.6%
|-
|3||190||4.5k||TECH +15||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +0.9%
|-
|4||200||8k||TECH +20||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +1.2%
|-
|5||210||12.5k||TECH +25||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%
|-
|6||220||18k||TECH +30||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +1.8%
|-
|7||230||24.5k||TECH +35||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +2.1%
|-
|8||240||32k||TECH +40||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +2.4%
|-
|9||250||40.5k||TECH +45||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +2.7%
|-
|10||260||50k||TECH +50||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +3%
|-
|11||270||60.5k||TECH +55||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +3.3%
|-
|12||285||72k||TECH +60||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +3.6%
|-
|13||300||84.5k||TECH +65||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +3.9%
|-
|14||315||98k||TECH +70||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +4.2%
|-
|15||330||112k||TECH +75||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +4.5%
|-
|16||345||123k||TECH +80||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +4.8%
|-
|17||360||144k||TECH +85||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +5.1%
|-
|18||375||162k||TECH +90||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +5.4%
|-
|19||390||180k||TECH +95||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +5.7%
|-
|20||400||200k||TECH +100||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +6%
|-
|21||420||220k||TECH +105||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +6.3%
|-
|22||440||242k||TECH +110||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +6.6%
|-
|23||460||264k||TECH +115||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +6.9%
|-
|24||480||285k||TECH +120||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +7.2%
|-
|25||500||309k||TECH +125||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +7.5%
|-
|26||520||333k||TECH +130||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +7.8%
|-
|27||540||357k||TECH +135||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +8.1%
|-
|28||560||381k||TECH +140||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +8.4%
|-
|29||580||405k||TECH +145||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +8.7%
|-
|30||600||429k||TECH +150||Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +9%
|}

==Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Bald Dev is. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +10
|-
|2||4k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +20
|-
|3||6k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +30
|-
|4||8k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +40
|-
|5||10k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +50
|-
|6||12k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +60
|-
|7||14k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +70
|-
|8||16k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +80
|-
|9||18k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +90
|-
|10||20k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +100
|-
|11||22k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +110
|-
|12||24k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +120
|-
|13||26k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +130
|-
|14||28k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +140
|-
|15||30k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +150
|-
|16||32k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +160
|-
|17||34k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +170
|-
|18||36k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +180
|-
|19||38k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +190
|-
|20||40k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +200
|-
|21||42k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +210
|-
|22||44k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +220
|-
|23||46k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +230
|-
|24||48k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +240
|-
|25||50k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +250
|-
|26||55k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +260
|-
|27||60k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +270
|-
|28||65k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +280
|-
|29||70k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +290
|-
|30||75k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop HP +300
|}

== Research Ability ==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Peter Jr. specializes in '''Mecha Gene''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Mecha is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

== Minion - Keyboard Warrior ==
A little man programmed by Peter Jr. It can slightly tamper with its stats through a loophole in the game!

===Special Ability - Stack Overflow===
Per 10 Keyboard Warriors in battle, Troop RUSH +10 (multiplied by minion level)

=== Minion Relics ===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Keyboard Warriors!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Arirang Satellite}}<br>{{relink|Arirang Satellite}}
|Keyboard Warrior HP +1%
|Keyboard Warrior DEF +1%
|Keyboard Warrior ATK +1%
|Keyboard Warrior RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Enigma Machine}}<br>{{relink|Enigma Machine}}
|Keyboard Warrior HP +1%
|Keyboard Warrior DEF +1%
|Keyboard Warrior ATK +1%
|Keyboard Warrior RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Bell's Telephone}}<br>{{relink|Bell's Telephone}}
|Keyboard Warrior HP +2%
|Keyboard Warrior DEF +2%
|Keyboard Warrior ATK +2%
|Keyboard Warrior RUSH +2%
|Keyboard Warrior All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Tesla Coil}}<br>{{relink|Tesla Coil}}
|Keyboard Warrior HP +2%
|Keyboard Warrior DEF +2%
|Keyboard Warrior ATK +2%
|Keyboard Warrior RUSH +2%
|Keyboard Warrior All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Higgs Boson}}<br>{{relink|Higgs Boson}}
|Keyboard Warrior RUSH +4%
|Keyboard Warrior RUSH +4%
|Keyboard Warrior RUSH +4%
|Keyboard Warrior RUSH +4%
|Keyboard Warrior RUSH +4%
|Keyboard Warrior RUSH +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Matrix System}}<br>{{relink|Matrix System}}
|Keyboard Warrior ATK +4%
|Keyboard Warrior ATK +4%
|Keyboard Warrior ATK +4%
|Keyboard Warrior ATK +4%
|Keyboard Warrior ATK +4%
|Keyboard Warrior ATK +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Pt-Cont Transistor}}<br>{{relink|Pt-Cont Transistor}}
|Keyboard Warrior DEF +4%
|Keyboard Warrior DEF +4%
|Keyboard Warrior DEF +4%
|Keyboard Warrior DEF +4%
|Keyboard Warrior DEF +4%
|Keyboard Warrior DEF +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Tetromino}}<br>{{relink|Tetromino}}
|Keyboard Warrior HP +4%
|Keyboard Warrior HP +4%
|Keyboard Warrior HP +4%
|Keyboard Warrior HP +4%
|Keyboard Warrior HP +4%
|Keyboard Warrior HP +4%
|-
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
